subtab.title: Enhanced PDP
subtab.description: Enhanced behavior for Product Detail Pages

enhancedPDP.videoIdField.title: Image Gallery - Video Item Field
enhancedPDP.videoIdField.description: Internal id of the Item field where the associated YouTube video id is stored.

enhancedPDP.videoPosition.title: Image Gallery - Video Position
enhancedPDP.videoPosition.description: Index in the gallery where the video thumbnail will be inserted.

enhancedPDP.closeMode.title: Image Gallery - Popup Closing Mode
enhancedPDP.closeMode.description: Defines the closing mode for the full view image popup.
